title: ReturnItem
description: A view of a returned item.

id.description: The unique identifier of this returned item.

quantity.description: The quantity of items for which a return was requested.

total.description: The total price of the line item.

id.description: Unique identifier of the preferred outcome.

label.description: A displayable label for the preferred outcome.
A displayable label for the reason.

received_quantity.description: The quantity of items marked as received by the merchant.

pending_quantity.description: The quantity of items pending receipt by the merchant.

approved_quantity.description: The quantity of items approved for return by the merchant.

pending_quantity.description: The quantity of items pending receipt by the merchant.

rejected_quantity.description: The quantity of items rejected by the merchant.
